name: Benny Henge
description: Ancient stone circle structure, likely an easter egg referencing Stonehenge. A mysterious archaeological site with standing stones arranged in a circle pattern.
how_to_reach: Fly to Daymar, look near the coordinates. Location is on the surface.
what_makes_it_special: Mysterious ancient ruins, very atmospheric, great for photos
lore: Origin unknown, possibly ancient alien civilization or precursor to current species
visitor_tips: Best viewed at sunrise/sunset. Bring a rover for easier exploration.

name: The River
description: A flowing river canyon cutting through the frozen landscape of MicroTech, one of the few liquid water features visible.
how_to_reach: Land near Port Tressler and traverse the frozen canyons
what_makes_it_special: Rare liquid water on a frozen moon, dramatic canyon landscapes
lore: Geological anomaly bringing liquid water to the surface
visitor_tips: Watch your speed in the canyon. Great opportunity for glider flights.

name: MicroTech Christmas Tree
description: A conical mountain formation that resembles a decorated Christmas tree when viewed from above.
how_to_reach: Fly over the mountains near Orison and look down
what_makes_it_special: Natural rock formation creating holiday imagery, great for photos
lore: Purely geological coincidence, though locals embrace it as a seasonal landmark
visitor_tips: Best viewed during the holiday season in-game. Higher altitude recommended.

name: Kudre Ore Mine Hidden Facility
description: Abandoned mining facility with underground tunnels and remnants of old mining operations.
how_to_reach: Navigate to Aberdeen's mining zones, look for tunnel entrances
what_makes_it_special: Industrial archaeology, abandoned structures, underground exploration
lore: Failed mining operation from early colonization era
visitor_tips: Bring lights - underground is dark. Watch for unstable structures.

name: Everus Harbor Crash Site
description: Wreckage of a large spacecraft scattered across the surface, remnants of a catastrophic crash.
how_to_reach: Land near Everus Harbor and investigate the crash zones
what_makes_it_special: Massive ship debris field, eerie atmosphere, salvage opportunities
lore: Site of a major transport disaster during the expansion era
visitor_tips: Requires ship with scanning equipment. Be cautious of radiation zones.

name: Orison Floating Temples
description: Small floating temples/platforms suspended in Crusader's upper atmosphere, accessible by ship.
how_to_reach: Navigate Crusader's cloud layer, look for floating structures
what_makes_it_special: Unique architecture, atmospheric flight experience, spiritual atmosphere
lore: Local religious sites maintained by monks and isolationist communities
visitor_tips: Requires precise flight control. Atmospheric scramble recommended.

name: Shubin Mining Station Remnants
description: Abandoned Shubin Mining facilities scattered throughout Yela's asteroid belt
how_to_reach: Navigate the asteroid belt around Yela
what_makes_it_special: Zero-G exploration, abandoned industrial sites, asteroid field navigation
lore: Remnants of the first major mining operations in Stanton
visitor_tips: EVA required for full exploration. Watch for mining laser hazards.

name: Spider's Graveyard
description: Massive collection of destroyed ships and stations, a testament to Pyro's dangerous nature.
how_to_reach: Navigate the debris fields around Pyro I
what_makes_it_special: Spectacular ship graveyard, scavenging opportunities, danger
lore: Site of multiple major battles and pirate conflicts
visitor_tips: High danger zone. Come armed and with friends. Salvage equipment essential.

name: Nyx Archaeological Dig Site
description: Active archaeological excavation site uncovering ancient ruins of unknown origin.
how_to_reach: Navigate Nyx surface near the dig site markers
what_makes_it_special: Ongoing scientific discovery, ancient artifacts, alien architecture
lore: Potentially related to the precursor civilization that built the Hadesian artifacts
visitor_tips: Restricted area - may need diplomatic access. Photography restricted.

name: Tram & Mine CA 4 Henge
description: Stone circle formation similar to Benny Henge, possibly another ancient site.
how_to_reach: Navigate to the mining outpost CA 4, search nearby
what_makes_it_special: Another mysterious stone circle, different from Benny Henge's design
lore: Possible connection to the same builders as Benny Henge
visitor_tips: Coordinates less precise - requires exploration by rover.

name: The Gunk (Oil Fields)
description: Massive industrial oil extraction and processing facilities with dramatic flame stacks.
how_to_reach: Fly toward the industrial regions of Lyria's processing plants
what_makes_it_special: Impressive industrial scale, dramatic lighting at night, labyrinthine structures
lore: Major source of refined fuel for the system
visitor_tips: Atmospheric pollution - keep helmets sealed. Avoid flame stacks.

name: Salvation Junkyard
description: Massive junkyard facility where decommissioned ships and equipment are processed.
what_makes_it_special: Ship boneyard atmosphere, rusting hulks, industrial scale
lore: The final resting place for thousands of ships across Stanton and Pyro
visitor_tips: Asking before entering recommended - this is active business territory.

name: Cave of the Ancients
description: Deep underground cave system with bioluminescent flora and unusual rock formations.
how_to_reach: Find cave entrance in Selene's mountain regions
what_makes_it_special: Beautiful natural formations, bioluminescence, spelunking adventure
lore: Local legends speak of healing properties in the cave's waters
visitor_tips: Strong light sources essential. Cave diving skills required for full exploration.

name: Shattered Moon Debris Ring
description: Constantly shifting ring of debris surrounding Yela, evidence of a shattered satellite.
how_to_reach: Navigate Yela's orbit, enter the debris field
what_makes_it_special: Dynamic environment, salvage opportunities, space navigation challenge
lore: Multiple theories about what caused the moon to break apart
visitor_tips: Extremely hazardous navigation. Tractor beam small pilot recommended.

name: Jump Point Observation Deck
description: Natural snail point markings - observe the star-streaking effect approaching jump points from a distance.
how_to_reach: Navigate near but not through jump points
what_makes_it_special: Edge-of-space visual effect, star-streaking, jump point mechanics
lore: The gateway to new systems, no artificial construction required
visitor_tips: Maintain safe distance - jump points can destabilize with close approach.

name: Terraforming Stagnation Zones
description: Areas where terraforming was abandoned mid-process, showing half-formed environments.
how_to_reach: Scan surface for incomplete terraforming signatures
what_makes_it_special: Surreal partial landscapes, environmental contrast, abandoned equipment
lore: Reminders of the UEE's failed or paused colonization projects
visitor_tips: Environmental hazards common in transition zones. Full EVA suit required.
